tagline: Embed a Genie Space (Beta): You can now embed a Genie Space as an iframe in a website or application.
what_it_does: Embed a Genie Space (Beta): You can now embed a Genie Space as an iframe in a website or application. Space thumbnails: Genie Space authors can now attach thumbnails to a space. Thumbnails appear on the Genie Space's initial chat page and in Genie One.
why_it_matters: Before sharing the agent with users, Databricks recommends adding example SQL queries, instructions, and knowledge store configurations to improve response accuracy.
plain_summary: Embed a Genie Space (Beta): You can now embed a Genie Space as an iframe in a website or application. Space thumbnails: Genie Space authors can now attach thumbnails to a space.
key_takeaway: Embed a Genie Space (Beta): You can now embed a Genie Space as an iframe in a website or application.
